info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Cognitive Services Management API
Microsoft Azure List Cognitive Services Accounts

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Returns all the Cognitive Services accounts in a subscription.

info.name: Microsoft Azure List Accounts by Resource Group

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Returns all Cognitive Services accounts in a resource group.

info.name: Microsoft Azure Get a Cognitive Services Account

params.name: subscriptionId

params.name: accountName
params.description: The name of the Cognitive Services account.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Returns a Cognitive Services account specified by the parameters.

info.name: Microsoft Azure Create or Update a Cognitive Services Account

params.name: subscriptionId

params.description: The name of the resource group.

params.name: accountName
params.description: The name of the Cognitive Services account.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Creates a Cognitive Services account. Accounts is a resource group wide resource type. It holds the keys for developer to access intelligent APIs.
